data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of 'Deposit collection vs full payment', but the evidence does not provide clear information on how the system handles these payment options. While the linked use case mentions payment collection via Stripe, there is no specific evidence confirming that the system supports both deposit collection and full payment options. This lack of clarity leads to a gap in the requirement coverage for the expected result of the scenario.
gaps: No evidence confirming the handling of deposit collection vs full payment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
